title: macOS closed alpha distribution package
created_from: user request to move LocalVoiceInput from a local daily-use dev tool to an installable macOS App for colleagues and friends

follow_ups.title: Developer ID notarized distribution path
follow_ups.reason: The first closed alpha intentionally avoids Apple Developer Program and notarization. Wider external distribution should add Developer ID Application/Installer signing, hardened runtime, notarization, stapling, Gatekeeper acceptance, and possibly a pkg installer.

follow_ups.title: Model update and asset delivery flow
follow_ups.reason: The closed alpha bundles the Qwen3 0.6B production model. Broader distribution needs a deliberate UX for updates, hosting, checksum, resume, cleanup, and possibly Apple-hosted or separately hosted assets.

follow_ups.title: App Store and TestFlight readiness
follow_ups.reason: Mac App Store and TestFlight distribution introduce sandbox, review, App Store Connect, and possibly Apple-hosted asset pack constraints that are separate from closed alpha distribution.

follow_ups.title: Closed-alpha launch and lifecycle ergonomics
follow_ups.reason: VM manual smoke exposed that a menu-bar-only LSUIElement app is not obvious enough for non-technical testers to start, find, quit, or reopen. Closed alpha should provide clearer launch/quit guidance and may need Spotlight/Application launch guidance, a diagnostics entry, and optional login-item/start-at-login support.
